reviews.comment:
Café caro y servido en tacita de té,  el wifi casi nunca funciona y los autos forman fila sobre la vereda para cargar combustible , la gente no puede circular, baños bien aunque sin papel , detalle. Lo demás bien, atención y estética.

(Translated by Google)
Expensive coffee served in a teacup, the Wi-Fi almost never works, and cars line up on the sidewalk to refuel, making it hard for people to walk. The restrooms are fine, though they're out of toilet paper, which is a minor issue. Otherwise, the service and the decor are good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNbFlQMVFREAE

reviews.comment:
Un verdadero desastre la atención en los talleres, tuvieron mi auto una semana para diagnosticar una falla, cuando lo fui a retirar (sin arreglar nada) me aseguraron que era la computadora y que ellos no lo hacían. Me fuí como llegué. Por suerte me recomendaron un electrónico en otro lugar y me lo solucionó en el día, era un problema menor ( cambiar un sensor). Además, durante la semana que los esperé ( me tenían de un día para el otro) me atendían malísimamente, una atención soberbia y deplorable. Nunca más aquellos tiempos en que el ACA era otra cosa,

(Translated by Google)
The service at the workshops was a complete disaster. They kept my car for a week to diagnose a problem, and when I went to pick it up (with nothing fixed), they assured me it was the computer and that they didn't repair it. I left just as I arrived. Luckily, someone recommended an electronics technician at another place, and he fixed it the same day. It was a minor problem (replacing a sensor). Furthermore, during the week I waited for them (they kept me waiting from one day to the next), the service was appalling—arrogant and deplorable. Never again those days when the ACA was something else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNbFpMN1JREAE

reviews.comment:
Un espanto pésima atención en tercer piso tanto que fui por cambio  filtro /aceite  y ruido  rulemanes, me estaba yendo  por el mal trato recibido  y por suerte en PB un empleado venezolano hizo en el momento cambio de filtro y aceite. Los rulemanes , me fui a FAZIO hoy 8 am me convidaron cafe , hicieron el presupuesto, y la atención impecable. a las 16 hs lo retiro.  Tercer piso recepción  de ACA abstenerse

(Translated by Google)
The service on the third floor was appalling. I went there for an oil/filter change and to fix noisy bearings, and I was about to leave because of the poor treatment. Luckily, a Venezuelan employee on the ground floor changed the oil and filter right away. For the bearings, I went to FAZIO today at 8 am. They offered me coffee, gave me an estimate, and the service was impeccable. I'm picking it up at 4 pm. ACA reception on the third floor, please refrain from contacting them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNeFlHSzJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
la verdad es que dicen x ahí que su combustible es veneno para motores desde 26 a 30 años para atrás.; sugiero más averiguaciones al respecto

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that they've been saying that their fuel is poison for engines for 26 to 30 years now; I suggest further investigation into this.

reviews.comment:
El lava auto automático es bastante bueno. El proceso toma 20 minutos (pero conviene verificar la fila en la calle). Descuentos para socios del ACA. En el área de secado, deben mejorar la forma en que secan los vidrios (los dejan manchados!)

(Translated by Google)
The automatic car wash is quite good. The process takes 20 minutes (but it's worth checking the line outside). Discounts for ACA members. In the drying area, they need to improve how they dry the windows (they leave streaks!).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncVlyWC1BRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
They have fuel, but they say it's a "fast food" place, and for example, today they didn't even have croissants.
